tables.name: _sqlx_migrations
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE _sqlx_migrations (
    version BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    installed_on TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    success BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
    checksum BLOB NOT NULL,
    execution_time BIGINT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: system
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE system (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: emulator
tables.comment: Emulator configurations for running software on different systems

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE emulator (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    executable TEXT NOT NULL,
    extract_files INTEGER NOT NULL,
    arguments TEXT NOT NULL, -- arguments as JSON string 
    system_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: franchise
tables.comment: Game/software franchises (e.g., Zork, Jet Set Willy)
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE franchise (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: software_title
tables.comment: Individual software titles that can belong to a franchise

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (franchise_id) REFERENCES franchise (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE software_title (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    franchise_id INTEGER,
    FOREIGN KEY (franchise_id) REFERENCES franchise(id)
)

tables.name: release
tables.comment: Specific releases of software (versions, editions, regions, compilations, different media)
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE release (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL
, thumbnail_filename TEXT)

tables.name: file_set
tables.comment: Collections of files that belong together
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE file_set (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    file_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    file_type INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL
 , source TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '')

tables.name: release_file_set

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE release_file_set (
    release_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    file_set_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (release_id, file_set_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: setting
tables.comment: Application settings stored as key-value pairs
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE setting (
    key TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    value TEXT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: document_viewer
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE document_viewer (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    executable TEXT NOT NULL,
    document_type INTEGER NOT NULL,
    arguments TEXT NOT NULL
, cleanup_temp_files BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE)

tables.name: release_system

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "release_system" (
    release_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    system_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (release_id, system_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: release_software_title

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (software_title_id) REFERENCES software_title (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "release_software_title" (
    release_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    software_title_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (release_id, software_title_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (software_title_id) REFERENCES software_title(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: file_info_system

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (file_info_id) REFERENCES file_info (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE file_info_system (
    file_info_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    system_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (file_info_id, system_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (file_info_id) REFERENCES file_info(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system(id)
)

tables.name: file_sync_log
tables.comment: Tracking log for file synchronization operations
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE file_sync_log (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    file_info_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    sync_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    status INTEGER NOT NULL,
    message TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    cloud_key TEXT NOT NULL
)

tables.name: release_item

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE release_item (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    release_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    item_type INTEGER NOT NULL,
    notes TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: release_item_file_set

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (release_item_id) REFERENCES release_item (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE release_item_file_set (
    release_item_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    file_set_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (release_item_id, file_set_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (release_item_id) REFERENCES release_item(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: file_set_item_type

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE file_set_item_type (
    file_set_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    item_type INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (file_set_id, item_type),
    FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: dat_file

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE dat_file (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    dat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    version TEXT NOT NULL,
    date TEXT,
    author TEXT NOT NULL,
    homepage TEXT,
    url TEXT,
    subset TEXT,
    imported_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
, system_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES system(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)

tables.name: dat_game

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (dat_file_id) REFERENCES dat_file (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE dat_game (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    dat_file_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    game_id TEXT,
    description TEXT NOT NULL,
    cloneof TEXT,
    cloneofid TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (dat_file_id) REFERENCES dat_file(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: dat_rom

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (dat_game_id) REFERENCES dat_game (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE dat_rom (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    dat_game_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    size INTEGER NOT NULL,
    crc TEXT NOT NULL,
    md5 TEXT NOT NULL,
    sha1 TEXT NOT NULL,
    sha256 TEXT,
    status TEXT,
    serial TEXT,
    header TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (dat_game_id) REFERENCES dat_game(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: file_set_dat_file_link

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (dat_file_id) REFERENCES dat_file (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE file_set_dat_file_link (
    file_set_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    dat_file_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (file_set_id, dat_file_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (dat_file_id) REFERENCES dat_file(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: file_set_file_info

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (file_info_id) REFERENCES file_info (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE file_set_file_info (
    file_set_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    file_info_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    -- same file can have different names in different file sets
    file_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    PRIMARY KEY (file_set_id, file_info_id),
    FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (file_info_id) REFERENCES file_info(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
)

tables.name: system_libretro_core

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "system_libretro_core" (
    id        INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    system_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES system(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    core_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    UNIQUE(system_id, core_name)
)

tables.name: file_info
tables.comment: Metadata about files including checksums and sizes
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "file_info" (
    id                INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL,
    sha1_checksum     BLOB    NOT NULL,
    file_size         INTEGER NOT NULL,
    archive_file_name TEXT,
    file_type         INTEGER,
    is_available      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
)

relations.def: FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (franchise_id) REFERENCES franchise (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (software_title_id) REFERENCES software_title (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (file_info_id) REFERENCES file_info (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (release_id) REFERENCES release (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (release_item_id) REFERENCES release_item (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (dat_file_id) REFERENCES dat_file (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (dat_game_id) REFERENCES dat_game (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (dat_file_id) REFERENCES dat_file (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (file_info_id) REFERENCES file_info (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (file_set_id) REFERENCES file_set (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES system (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
